design_plan: rng=42; AIDA checked; hero max-width 1120px -> 2–3 lines; bento + compare grids include grid-auto-flow:dense; label sweep OK; CTA contrast black/white validated
headline: Order food with AI — a personal agent that actually places the order for you

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to order meals, groceries, and delivery without babysitting apps
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Order food with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
queries: computer use AI agent ordering food
site_brief.title: Order food with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can coordinate food ordering across delivery apps, preferences, addresses, payment confirmation, and repeat orders

summary: An indexable, end‑to‑end use‑case page showing how Super helps people order meals and groceries with a real computer‑using AI agent. The page explains the workflow, cites current reporting on AI food ordering, compares Super to Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Folk, and Orchids, and highlights why a reusable computer-use cache makes repeated food orders faster and cheaper over time. Includes every sibling use‑case link in the cluster and is production‑ready with HTML, CSS, JS, schema, and design system.
